view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The exploratory step validates the persona scenario of transferring bookings between locations, which is explicitly supported by the use case.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The exploratory step validates the persona scenario of transferring bookings between locations, which is explicitly supported by the use case.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly states that if the downtown X-ray machine breaks, appointments auto-transfer to the nearest location with capacity. This directly aligns with the exploratory step's instruction to validate the outcome of transferring bookings between locations. Additionally, the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a clear failure report is achievable based on the outlined functionality in the use case.
